memberdef.name: ADDRESS_1_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 1 /* MSB byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_2_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Middle byte of address to read or write */

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XQspiPsu device driver using NAND flash devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the QspiPsu device.
contains the base address of the device
is the interrupt Id for an QSPIPSU device.

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function erases the sectors in the serial Flash connected to the QSPIPSU interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
contains the address of the first sector which needs to be erased.

memberdef.argsstring: (XQspiPsu *QspiPsuPtr, u32 Address, u32 ByteCount, u8 Command, u8 *WriteBfrPtr)
memberdef.name: FlashWrite

briefdescription.para: This function writes to the serial Flash connected to the QSPIPSU interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
contains the address to write data to in the Flash.
contains the number of bytes to write.
is the command used to write data to the flash.
to the write buffer (which is to be transmitted)

memberdef.argsstring: (XQspiPsu *QspiPsuPtr, u32 Address, u32 ByteCount, u8 Command, u8 *WriteBfrPtr, u8 *ReadBfrPtr)
memberdef.name: FlashRead

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
contains the address of the first sector which needs to be erased.
contains the total size to be erased.
is the command used to read data from the flash. Supports normal, fast, dual and quad read commands.
to the write buffer which contains data to be transmitted
to the read buffer to which valid received data should be written

briefdescription.para: This API can be used to write to a flash register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
is the flash register address
is the pointer to value to be read.

simplesect.para: This API can only be used for one flash at a time.

briefdescription.para: This API can be used to write to a flash register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
is the flash register address.
to be written to register.

simplesect.para: This API can only be used for one flash at a time.

briefdescription.para: This API is to check bad block information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.

briefdescription.para: This API is to get flash status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.

simplesect.para: This API can only be used for one flash at a time.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Parameter Page data from the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the QSPIPSU driver component to use.
is the parameter page information to return.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates parameter page CRC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the ONFI parameter page buffer.
is the starting offset in buffer to calculate CRC.
is the number of bytes for which CRC is calculated.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the QSPIPSU Flash Polled example.
